title: Agent Schema
description: Defines the configuration, capabilities, and behavior settings of an AI agent in the system

id.description: Unique identifier for the agent instance

name.description: Human-readable name for identifying and displaying the agent

description.description: Comprehensive description of the agent's purpose, capabilities, and intended use cases

agent_type.description: Categorization of the agent's primary function and behavior model

agent_platform.description: The platform the agent is built on

prompt_template.description: Base template used for constructing prompts, including placeholders and formatting instructions

reasoning.description: Specific reasoning methodology employed by the agent (e.g., 'chain-of-thought', 'direct', 'step-by-step')

style.description: Writing style guidelines for agent responses (e.g., 'concise', 'detailed', 'technical')

persona.description: Character or role the agent should embody in responses (e.g., 'expert', 'teacher', 'assistant')

oneOf.description: Single guideline string for simple cases
List of specific behavioral guidelines and rules for the agent

guidelines.description: Behavioral guidelines and rules that govern the agent's responses

response_validation.description: Flag indicating whether responses should undergo validation checks

chat_history.description: Flag indicating whether the agent should maintain conversation context

chat_history_params.description: Configuration parameters for managing chat history and context retention

max_turns.description: Maximum number of conversation turns to retain

custom_validations.description: List of custom validation rules to apply to agent responses

custom_tools.description: List of specialized tools or capabilities available to the agent

custom_responses.description: Custom response templates and patterns for specific scenarios

source.description: Provenance of the agent record. `local_import` is set by the SDK's SyncManager.convert_session_to_traigent_format when an agent is created from a local optimization session; other producers (UI / API / SDK / generic import) may use the analogous tag.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the agent was created

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last modification to the agent

example_sets.description: Collection of example sets used for agent training or validation

retrieval_configs.description: Configuration settings for information retrieval capabilities

measures.description: Performance and evaluation measures associated with the agent

model_parameters.description: Model-specific parameters and configurations for the agent
